attributes.action: Allow the use of pyrotechnics at football matches played in England
attributes.additional_details: It would enhance the atmosphere in all games across England and would create incredible/ unforgettable memories for the people who are around it and love going to football every single weekend.
attributes.background: I would like the government to change the laws within pyrotechnics at football games and to allow them to be used across England. If a pyrotechnic was to be thrown onto the field of play then the offender should be issued with a immediate football banning order.
